mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coach ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coach (username, password, name, phone, email, avatar, specialty, experience, professional_score, teaching_score, communication_score, service_score, performance_score, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{specialty}, #{experience}, #{professionalScore}, #{teachingScore}, #{communicationScore}, #{serviceScore}, #{performanceScore}, #{status})
